title: My Sister Stole $435K From Our Dying Mom And Cut Me Off. So I Refused To Help Her Daughter.
description: My sister manipulated our dying mother into signing over her entire $435K estate, then cut me off. Years later, when her daughter needed a life-saving bone marrow transplant, I was the only match. I refused to donate until she publicly confessed everything and wired me every cent back. #FamilyBetrayal #RevengeStory #Karma
thumb_text: SHE STOLE MOM'S $435K AND THEN BEGGED FOR MY BONE MARROW

thumb_lines.text: HER DAUGHTER WAS DYING AND I WAS THE ONLY MATCH
